## Change Summary
Describe the production behavior change in 3-5 sentences.

## Production Impact
- [ ] no impact on real-time fraud path
- [ ] training-only change
- [ ] feature contract change
- [ ] threshold or decision-behavior change
- [ ] endpoint deployment behavior change
- [ ] monitoring / alarm behavior change
- [ ] IAM / networking / security posture change

## Risk Classification
- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high

## Validation Performed
- [ ] unit tests passed
- [ ] contract tests passed
- [ ] local smoke test passed
- [ ] stage replay validation attached
- [ ] threshold simulation attached if applicable
- [ ] deployment smoke test passed

## Rollback Plan
- Previous stable model package or config:
- Rollback method:
- Estimated rollback time:
- Who approves rollback if business KPIs breach:

## Operational Checklist
- [ ] runbook update required and completed if behavior changed
- [ ] dashboards/alarms reviewed
- [ ] prod config updated if needed
- [ ] evidence bundle path included in release plan
- [ ] relevant CODEOWNERS requested
